title: Multiply 2-Digit Numbers with Regrouping
essential_question: How do you multiply a 2-digit number by a 1-digit number?

hints: Try drawing an array or using place value.

feedback.incorrect: Not quite. The answer is 104. Multiply place by place.

hints: Think about what multiply 2digit regrouping means.
Try drawing an array or using place value.

feedback.incorrect: Not quite. The answer is 266. Multiply place by place.
Not quite. The answer is B. 6×7=42, 6×4=24, +4=28→282.

hints: Multiplication is repeated addition. Use known facts when possible.

pretest.question: When a column product is 10 or more, regroup the tens digit.

feedback.incorrect: The answer is True.

hints: Multiplication is repeated addition. Use known facts when possible.
Think about what multiply 2digit regrouping means.
Try drawing an array or using place value.

feedback.incorrect: Not quite. The answer is 522. Multiply place by place.

learn.title: 2-Digit × 1-Digit
learn.content: To multiply a 2-digit number by a 1-digit number, multiply the ones, regroup, then multiply the tens and add.
learn.tts: To multiply a 2-digit number by a 1-digit number, multiply the ones, regroup, then multiply the tens and add.

learn.title: Multiply the Tens
learn.content: Then 4×2(tens)=8(tens), plus the 2 tens you carried = 10 tens. Write 10. Final: 104.
learn.tts: Then 4×2(tens)=8(tens), plus the 2 tens you carried = 10 tens. Write 10. Final: 104.

learn.title: Align the Answer
learn.content: Write the product below the line, starting from the ones place. Keep columns neat.
learn.tts: Write the product below the line, starting from the ones place. Keep columns neat.

learn.title: Check with Estimation
learn.content: 4×26 ≈ 4×25 = 100. Answer 104 is very close — looks right.
learn.tts: 4×26 ≈ 4×25 = 100. Answer 104 is very close — looks right.

learn.title: Work Carefully
learn.content: Regrouping is easy to mess up. Take your time and write the carried digit clearly.
learn.tts: Regrouping is easy to mess up. Take your time and write the carried digit clearly.
